subcodes.first_line: O thou noble branch of the Blessed Tree! Verily, a severe affliction hath descended upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره المبارکه فی الحقیقه بلیه شدیده بر آنجناب وارد و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @rejection, opposition and persecution
